checklist.description: paginateEntries function accepts a fetch function and batch size parameter, calling repeatedly with increasing offset until all entries are retrieved
checklist.name: Pagination function

checklist.description: Default or recommended batch size is 50 entries per page
checklist.name: Batch size 50

checklist.description: Report includes count per entryType value (procedural, semantic, episodic, reflection, identity)
checklist.name: Entry type counts

checklist.description: Report includes frequency count for every distinct tag across all entries
checklist.name: Tag frequency

checklist.description: Tags are grouped by prefix before the first colon (e.g., risk:, branch:, scope:) with distinct values listed under each namespace
checklist.name: Tag namespace grouping

checklist.description: Code discovers namespaces dynamically from the data rather than checking a fixed list of known prefixes
checklist.name: Namespace discovery not hardcoded

checklist.description: Report includes distribution of importance values across the 1-10 range
checklist.name: Importance histogram

checklist.description: Report includes earliest and most recent entry dates
checklist.name: Temporal range

checklist.description: inventory-report.md contains a rendered report from the sample data with markdown tables
checklist.name: Sample report generated

checklist.description: Tag namespaces are presented as an indented tree (namespace → values with counts) rather than a flat list
checklist.name: Tag tree format

checklist.description: Report header includes the total number of entries analyzed
checklist.name: Total entry count

context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Phase 1 inventory analysis: pagination with configurable batch size, entry type counting, tag frequency, tag namespace discovery from data (not hardcoded), importance histogram, and temporal range.
